name: Forgejo
compose:
name: slashnode-forgejo
services:
  server:
    image: codeberg.org/forgejo/forgejo:15.0.3-rootless
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      FORGEJO__security__INSTALL_LOCK: 'true'
      FORGEJO__server__DOMAIN: ${APP_DOMAIN}
      FORGEJO__server__HTTP_PORT: '8101'
      FORGEJO__server__SSH_DOMAIN: ${APP_DOMAIN}
      FORGEJO__server__SSH_PORT: ${APP_FORGEJO_SSH_PORT}
      FORGEJO__server__SSH_LISTEN_PORT: ${APP_FORGEJO_SSH_PORT}
      FORGEJO__server__START_SSH_SERVER: 'true'
      FORGEJO__database__DB_TYPE: postgres
      FORGEJO__database__HOST: forgejo_db_1:5432
      FORGEJO__database__NAME: forgejo
      FORGEJO__database__USER: forgejo
      FORGEJO__database__PASSWD: forgejo
    volumes:
      - server_data-forgejo-data:/var/lib/gitea
      - server_data-forgejo-config:/etc/gitea
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8101:8101
  db:
    image: postgres:17.3
    container_name: db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: forgejo
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: forgejo
      POSTGRES_DB: forgejo
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-forgejo-data:
    name: slashnode-forgejo_server_data-forgejo-data
  server_data-forgejo-config:
    name: slashnode-forgejo_server_data-forgejo-config
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-forgejo_db_data-db
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (forgejo). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://forgejo.org/.
